page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs, meaning there is exactly one thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading overhead.

This instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning storage must be attached externally. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance type.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g8ise.3xlarge offers predictable performance for general-purpose workloads. The absence of hyperthreading eliminates resource sharing at the core level, which is highly beneficial for compute-sensitive tasks that require consistent execution times. This configuration is suitable for applications such as web serving, application servers, medium-sized databases, and general enterprise workloads that require stable CPU performance without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ise.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor operating at 2.7 GHz, it features 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs, providing a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio that eliminates hyperthreading overhead. The system is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external storage attachments, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource distribution, this instance is designed for workloads requiring consistent performance, such as web serving, application servers, and enterprise applications.
